info.name: Sovereign Kanban — Persistence
info.summary: File-based persistence backend for Sovereign Kanban
info.description: Reads and writes Kanban boards and cards as flat Markdown files (.md with YAML frontmatter) and .board.yml in Nextcloud Files. Exposes a REST API consumed by the Sovereign Kanban UI. The data is never owned by a proprietary table.
info.author: Alain Lauzon
